instructions.instruction: Select the package ecosystem using the decision table: Homebrew for macOS packages/GUI apps, mise for CLI developer tools, pip for Python tools, Docker for containers, chezmoi externals for files/archives/repos, cli-versions for install-script CLIs.
instructions.original_snippets:
Choose the appropriate package manager (see `./ecosystem-guide.md` for details):
| Use Case | Ecosystem | Location |
| macOS packages (Homebrew) | brew/cask/mas | `home/.chezmoidata/packages.yaml` |
| CLI developer tools | mise (Aqua) | `.mise.toml` ...
instructions.relevant_when: Any request to add, update, or remove a package or tool in a chezmoi dotfiles repository

instructions.instruction: Organize chezmoi externals using the .chezmoiexternals/ directory structure, with one file per program (e.g. zsh.externals.toml, bat.externals.toml), not the legacy single .chezmoiexternal.toml file.
instructions.original_snippets:
IMPORTANT: Organize externals by primary program using the `.chezmoiexternals/` directory structure.
home/.chezmoiexternals/
├── zsh.externals.toml
├── bat.externals.toml
instructions.relevant_when: When adding or organizing chezmoi external dependencies

instructions.instruction: Pin git-repo externals to a 40-character commit SHA in the `revision` field — never use a branch name or 'latest'.
instructions.original_snippets:
NEVER use:
- `latest` tags
- Mutable branch names without SHA pinning
...
revision = "<commit-sha>"  # MUST pin to SHA
instructions.relevant_when: When adding or updating a git-repo type external

instructions.instruction: Pin file-type externals by embedding a commit SHA in the GitHub URL path (raw/<sha>/file.ext), not a branch name.
instructions.relevant_when: When adding a file-type external pointing to a GitHub raw file

instructions.instruction: Pin release binaries to a specific version tag AND include a `checksum = "sha256:..."` field.
instructions.original_snippets:
Release binary | Version tag + checksum | `v1.2.3` + `checksum = "sha256:..."`
NEVER use: `latest` tags
instructions.relevant_when: When adding an archive-file external that downloads a release binary

instructions.instruction: Include `refreshPeriod` in externals (168h recommended for weekly updates).
instructions.relevant_when: When writing any chezmoi external definition

instructions.instruction: Add a `# renovate: repo=USER/REPO branch=BRANCH` annotation immediately above each external definition to enable automated SHA updates.
instructions.relevant_when: When adding any pinned external dependency

instructions.instruction: For each external, verify or add a matching Renovate rule in renovate.json5 with the correct datasource: git-refs for SHA-based URLs, github-releases for version-tag URLs.
instructions.original_snippets:
See `./renovate-integration.md` for detailed patterns.
datasourceTemplate: 'git-refs'
datasourceTemplate: 'github-releases'
instructions.relevant_when: When adding or modifying any external that needs automated updates

instructions.instruction: The fileMatch in Renovate rules must match the .chezmoiexternals/ directory pattern: `^home/\.chezmoiexternals/.*\.toml(\.tmpl)?$`
instructions.relevant_when: When writing Renovate custom manager rules for chezmoi externals

instructions.instruction: Use .tmpl suffix on external files that require Go template processing (OS detection, architecture variables, conditional installs).
instructions.original_snippets: Use `.tmpl` suffix for templating support (OS conditionals, variables)
instructions.relevant_when: When an external needs platform-specific configuration or conditional logic

instructions.instruction: Wrap external definitions with `{{ if lookPath "tool" }}...{{ end }}` for conditional installation when the host tool may not be present.
instructions.relevant_when: When adding externals for optional or shell-specific tools

instructions.instruction: Always show `chezmoi diff` before proposing `chezmoi apply` so the user can confirm no unexpected files will change.
instructions.original_snippets:
Preview changes:
chezmoi diff
...NEVER skip `chezmoi diff` before proposing `chezmoi apply`
instructions.relevant_when: Any time changes are proposed that would be applied via chezmoi apply

instructions.instruction: Never execute package managers (brew install, mise use, chezmoi apply) without explicit user permission.
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER execute package managers without explicit permission
instructions.relevant_when: Any request involving package installation or chezmoi apply

instructions.instruction: Output changes in the structured format: Decision (ecosystem + rationale + organization), Files To Edit, Proposed Changes, Renovate Integration, Verification Commands, Next Steps checklist.
instructions.original_snippets:
Decision:
- Ecosystem: ...
- Rationale: ...
Files To Edit:
Proposed Changes:
Renovate Integration:
Verification Commands:
Next Steps:
instructions.relevant_when: Any time the agent proposes changes to dotfiles configuration

instructions.instruction: Use `gh api repos/USER/REPO/commits/BRANCH --jq .sha` to retrieve the latest commit SHA before adding a git-repo or file external.
instructions.original_snippets:
Verify latest commit SHA
gh api repos/USER/REPO/commits/BRANCH --jq .sha
instructions.relevant_when: When adding a new git-repo or GitHub file external

instructions.instruction: Before migrating from .chezmoiexternal.toml to .chezmoiexternals/, search for all references to the old file with grep before deleting or renaming it.
instructions.original_snippets:
Search for references to the old file before migration:
grep -r "\.chezmoiexternal\.toml\.tmpl" home/
instructions.relevant_when: When reorganizing existing externals from legacy single-file format to directory structure

instructions.instruction: Run `chezmoi diff` after migrating externals and only remove the legacy file after the diff succeeds cleanly (shows no unexpected changes).
instructions.original_snippets:
Verify with chezmoi diff (will error if references are broken)
Remove old file only after all references are updated and chezmoi diff succeeds
instructions.relevant_when: When completing a migration from .chezmoiexternal.toml to .chezmoiexternals/

instructions.instruction: Add Homebrew packages to home/.chezmoidata/packages.yaml under the correct platform section (darwin/linux) and category (brews/casks/mas).
instructions.original_snippets:
Edit home/.chezmoidata/packages.yaml
Add to appropriate section (darwin/linux, brews/casks/mas)
instructions.relevant_when: When adding macOS or Linux packages via Homebrew
